isi.lyrics:
Lyric BM (KARD) - View

Romanization

Sun down, it’s getting late
But she don’t wanna leave
Cause she hates when I’m away, yeah
I know I told you I'll take you back at eight
Guess plans ‘bout to change, uh huh

I’ma hit the spot that you like
We gon’ get in trouble tonight
You a beauty, you a muse, like
Eyes on you, and I never want to lose sight

God didn’t miss when He made you
You know they hating, wishing they could imitate you
Yeah, you got ‘em tight, got ‘em feeling like

Envy all in they eyes
She wavy, she got that vibe

I love her ‘cause she knows what to do
How you talk that talk, how you move
I ain’t mad one bit
Spotlight on you, baby
You deserve it, go and work it

Telling me to sit back, enjoy the view
(ah ah uh ah)
She telling me to back, back, enjoy the view
(ah ah uh ah)
Telling me to sit back, enjoy the

Seen so many tens, but none measure close
How you’re redefining beautiful
Oo baby in her element while she whines slow
Grinding on me like a pro

I ain’t seen nobody do it better
(no-one better no)
I want it more don’t you turn me into beggar
(beg for it, beg for it, ‘til you give it, baby)

She always first, ain’t ever on any waitlist
You want it baby, you’ll get it in any way
Ten toes, she grounded with her composure
Type a girl I want for the rest of my days

I said, God didn’t miss when He made you
Don’t you worry, I would never be unfaithful
(don’t worry, don’t worry, yeah you got it like)

isi.lyrics:
Lyric BM (KARD) - Ooh

Romanization

You got me saying, Ooh, I can’t take it
Every single move you’re making
Drives me wild, shawty, don’t slow down
I need a little more
Need a little more, Ooh

Girl take it, what you wanna do?
I swear I’ll get you right
Look into my eyes
I got you saying, Ooh, Ooh

Yeah, bottles on deck where you find me
Came here with your man, that’s a bad idea
‘Cause you be looking good, lil’ mami
And I know what your vibe is

Little Miss Independent, independent, right?
Piqued your interest, little princess
Caught your eye, oh, I

And don’t know what y’all heard about BM
I’ve been popping all season
Be straight P-I-M-P-ing
(If you got it, you got it)
(If you don’t, you don’t)

As long as we both on the same page, yeah
I’ll put you through your paces
If you stressed then you can
Take it out on me

You got me saying, Ooh, I can’t take it
Every single move you’re making

I need a little more
Need a little more, Ooh

Girl take it, what you wanna do?

I got you saying, Ooh, Ooh

Ain’t no compromise, ain’t no compromise
You can’t keep a secret
You can’t tell no lies
Keep it pushing, tell your man goodbye
‘Cause he couldn’t keep you satisfied

Like I, f**king like we enemies then bye bye
You should bring a couple friends with you
Next time, bet you’ll love the way I

isi.lyrics:
Lyric LIA (ITZY) - One Day

Romanization

I still hold the fear in my heart.
hollo gathyeobeorin sigan
But will I be gamanhi seoseo
idaero sarajiji anke
geudael bulleobwayo

modeungge dallajyeodo
geudaen bichi doeeojwoyo

One day, I had a scary dream.
Let's just think like that.
tto dasi ireona
it'll be fine after tonight.
geudaewa hamkke
Just for this moment with you.

tteollineun du numbitsoge
adeukhi beonjyeo your light
dasi uril close to me

meoreojiji marayo
geudael noji aneulgeyo

One day, I had a scary dream.
Let's just think like that.
tto dasi ireona
it'll be fine after tonight.
geudaewa hamkke
jamsi nuneul gama, moment

Uh
